india_trends.title: IKS Health acquires TruBridge Inc for upto $565 million
india_trends.summary: The deal, through IKS Health’s US subsidiary, will be funded by a loan of up to $670 million secured for a five-year term from Citibank, Deutsche Bank and JPMorgan Chase.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold drops $53/oz, silver down $3.7/oz as oil rebound fuels inflation fears
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices declined on 23 April, with gold futures at $4,700 and silver at $74.23, driven by rising crude oil prices and a stronger US dollar. Renewed geopolitical tensions in the Middle East heightened inflation fears, impacting investor sentiment.

india_trends.title: US stocks: American Airlines dims 2026 forecast as high fuel costs hurt margins
india_trends.summary: American Airlines cut its 2026 profit forecast on Thursday, pushing the lower-end of the range to a loss, as sky-high jet fuel costs driven by the Iran war hurt profit margins.

india_trends.title: Aurum PropTech crosses Rs 500 crore annualised recurring revenue
india_trends.summary: Aurum PropTech reported strong revenue growth and crossed a major ARR milestone while posting consecutive profitable quarters. Margin expansion, improved unit economics, and platform scaling supported performance despite ongoing investments and acquisitions across its proptech ecosystem

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday
india_trends.summary: Equity markets fell for a second session as IT, auto and financial stocks weighed on sentiment. Nifty and Sensex declined, volatility rose, and analysts highlighted key technical levels amid mixed global cues and selective stock buying interest

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday - The Economic Times
india_trends.summary: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday    The Economic Times

india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Dr Reddy’s Laboratories and Solar Industries on Friday for gains up to 14%
india_trends.summary: Nifty extended losses amid weakness in key sectors, facing resistance near moving averages. Analysts highlight a crucial trading range for direction while recommending select stocks showing bullish breakouts, strong momentum, and accumulation supported by rising volumes

india_trends.title: Infosys has its best growth in 3 years, but Big Five have another uncertain year ahead
india_trends.summary: Much like Infosys, its Big Five peers Tata Consultancy Services, Wipro, HCL Technologies and Tech Mahindra have all voiced concerns about the troubled demand environment

india_trends.title: Herjit Bhalla takes over as CEO of Dabur
india_trends.summary: Dabur India has appointed Herjit S. Bhalla as its new chief executive officer for the India business. This change is effective April 23, 2026. Mohit Malhotra will now serve as the global chief executive officer. Bhalla previously held a senior role at Hershey Company. This leadership transition foll

india_trends.title: Tata Capital sees reduction in credit cost on AI integration
india_trends.summary: Tata Capital reported a consolidated net profit of ₹1,502 crore in the three months through March, up 43% from the same period last year.

india_trends.title: US stocks: Honeywell forecasts second-quarter revenue below estimates over Middle East conflict
india_trends.summary: Honeywell on Thursday forecast second-quarter revenue below Wall Street estimates as conflict in the Middle East weighed on the U.S. industrial giant's business, sending shares down 2.3% in morning trade.

india_trends.title: US stocks: Warner Bros shareholders approve Paramount's $81 billion takeover of the Hollywood giant
india_trends.summary: Warner Bros. Discovery's shareholders approved an $81 billion sale of the company to Skydance-owned Paramount on Thursday, propelling a mega merger that could vastly reshape Hollywood and the wider media landscape closer to the finish line.

india_trends.title: US stocks: Lululemon sinks after new CEO hire from Nike fails to impress investors
india_trends.summary: Lululemon Athletica shares tumbled about 12% in early trading on Thursday, as the struggling athletic apparel maker's decision to tap a CEO from turnaround-embattled Nike failed to reassure investors.

india_trends.title: Infosys CFO Jayesh Sanghrajka says no decision on the timing and quantum of hike — What we know
india_trends.summary: Infosys CFO Jayesh Sanghrajka said the IT major has not made any decision on the timing and quantum of wage hikes. Sanghrajka and CEO Salil Parekh announced the IT major's Q4FY26 financial results today.

india_trends.title: GSR Launches Crypto Core3 ETF (BESO)
Cyient approves Rs 720 crore share buyback as Q4 profit falls sharply. Check premium
india_trends.summary: Cyient approved a share buyback while reporting a sharp decline in quarterly profit due to one time charges, even as revenue remained strong, reflecting resilient operations and continued investments despite earnings pressure

india_trends.title: Indian aviation sector to handle about 500 million passengers annually by 2030: NMIA chief
india_trends.summary: India's aviation industry is gearing up for an extraordinary transformation. Experts anticipate a surge to 500 million air travelers by 2030, jumping to an astounding billion by 2047. The surge is spurred by enthusiastic passenger demand and ambitious fleet expansion plans. Meanwhile, infrastructure

india_trends.title: Tips Music shares rise 8% to eight-month high after Q4 results; gain 31% in April
india_trends.summary: On April 23, Tips Music's stock climbed 8.02% to ₹660 after a strong Q4FY26 report, showing 32% revenue growth. For FY26, revenue rose 21%, and net profit increased by 30%.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Premji Invest takes stake in NewEra Hospitals to expand capacity, strengthen advanced care network
india_trends.summary: Premji Invest is backing NewEra Hospitals with a new investment. This funding will help NewEra expand its hospital capacity to 800 beds. The platform will also scale advanced specialty care across Maharashtra. NewEra currently operates three hospitals with 350 beds. The company plans to add three mo

india_trends.title: IEX Q4 results: Cons PAT rises 11% to Rs 130 crore, revenue up 13% on record electricity volumes
india_trends.summary: Indian Energy Exchange delivered steady quarterly growth driven by record electricity trading volumes, improving revenue and profit, alongside strong yearly performance supported by higher supply liquidity and expansion across power, gas and renewable certificate markets
